历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (Science Group) were approximately 2221, 2051, 3284, 2219, and 2240 respectively. Over the past 5 years, the overall range fluctuated between 2000 and 3300, with a drop to 3284 in 2023 due to the Medical Experimental Class (non-clinical) before quickly recovering; in 2024–2025, it stabilized around 2200, with a baseline of about 2240 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for the Science Group in Inner Mongolia: 9 in 2021, 31 in 2022, 27 in 2023, 29 in 2024, and 28 in 2025; in 2026, Physics Category has 10 places and Medical Category has 17, totaling 27, a slight reduction of about 3.6% compared to 2025, with limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 10th in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking for 6 consecutive years, belonging to the top tier of national universities; no significant negative incidents in 2026 reputation data; the 2025 reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (involving false reports on teacher ethics), but has been clarified; Douyin popularity total ranking 24th (relatively hot), with stable attention in recent years; no records of file dropping; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 13 disciplines achieved A- or above: Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A+, Electrical Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Mathematics A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A, Business Administration A, Management Science and Engineering A, Mechanics A, Biomedical Engineering A-, Electronic Science and Technology A-, Marxist Theory A, with extremely outstanding engineering strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended, highly compatible with the university's Engineering Experimental Classes (Computer, Electrical, Intelligent Manufacturing, etc.), with strong application appeal. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in the province is about 110,800, an increase of about 32% compared to 83,716 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Shaanxi (neighboring province), with natural regional appeal to Inner Mongolia candidates; in 2025, the university enrolled 8 students in Inner Mongolia (accounting for 1.34% of the national total of 598), a cross-provincial enrollment with a very small proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2240, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase of about 32% in Physics Category candidates in the province, and the strong appeal of the university's advantageous engineering disciplines and popular majors, competition in 2026 is expected to be slightly more intense than in 2025. After limited correction, the predicted minimum ranking is about 2252, with a range of 2004–2500.

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续走高，临床医学、口腔医学等专业尤其受到考生青睐。西安交通大学在内蒙古医学类招生规模较小（2026年仅17人），属于稀缺招生名额，竞争 较为激烈。学校地处西安，地理位置优越，交通便利，对北方地区考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型计算及近年位次趋势分析，2026年西安交通大学在内蒙古自治区医学类最低录取位次预测为2134名，波动区间为1920—2348名。2026年缩招导致竞争加剧，位 次较2025年有所前移（更难进），但受医学持续高热度和专业结构调整影响，位次下降幅度有限。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Xi'an Jiaotong University's medical category in Inner Mongolia over the past four years are: 2022: 2051st (plan: 22 students), 2023: 3284th (plan: 21 students, that year clinical and non-clinical categories were enrolled separately, with non-clinical lowering the overall ranking), 2024: 2219th (plan: 20 students), 2025: 2240th (plan: 19 students). In 2026, the medical category enrollment plan is 17 students, a decrease of 2 students from 2025, a reduction of about 10.5%. Overall, except for 2023 when the ranking was abnormal due to enrollment structure adjustments, the rankings from 2024 to 2025 stabilized around 2200th, showing a slow upward trend.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University is a key national university under the 985 Project and 211 Project, selected as a national Double First-Class construction university. Located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, it is a comprehensive public undergraduate institution. The university has strong medical disciplines, a comprehensive medical talent training system, a high reputation nationwide, and strong appeal to Inner Mongolia candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has continued to rise, with clinical medicine, stomatology, and other specialties particularly favored by candidates. Xi'an Jiaotong University's medical enrollment in Inner Mongolia is small (only 17 students in 2026), making it a scarce enrollment quota with intense competition. The university is located in Xi'an, with a superior geographical location and convenient transportation, strongly attracting candidates from northern regions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model calculation and recent ranking trend analysis, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Xi'an Jiaotong University's medical category in Inner Mongolia in 2026 is 2134th, with a fluctuation range of 1920 to 2348. The enrollment reduction in 2026 intensifies competition, moving the ranking forward (harder to enter) compared to 2025, but due to the sustained high popularity of medicine and adjustments in professional structure, the decline in ranking is limited.

- Medical Experimental Class (Medicine)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, use Tier 1 as a sprint, and Tier 3 as a safety. Clinical Medicine is the most competitive, with a higher chance if the ranking is within 2000th; Pharmacy is moderate; Medicine (Basic Medicine, Forensic Medicine, Preventive Medicine) is relatively easier to enter and can be a stable choice.
